mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_monitoring_event ( event_type, event_code, severity, title, message, detail_json, http_method, request_uri, query_string, client_ip, user_agent, user_id, user_role, trace_id, session_id, exception_class, exception_message, stack_trace, source_class, source_method, resolved_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{eventCode}, #{severity}, #{title}, #{message}, #{detailJson}, #{httpMethod}, #{requestUri}, #{queryString}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{traceId}, #{sessionId}, #{exceptionClass}, #{exceptionMessage}, #{stackTrace}, #{sourceClass}, #{sourceMethod}, #{resolvedYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
